results.sql:
SELECT School
FROM (
    SELECT T2.School, T1.AvgScrRead, T2.County, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.County ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rnk
    FROM satscores AS T1
    INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
    WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F'
) ranked_schools
WHERE rnk <= 5
ORDER BY County, AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 10000;
